input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.1.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.1.5
            TITLE: multiple vehicles may be on the track at the same time

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.1.5: Multiple vehicles may be on the track at the same time
D.12.1.5 Multiple vehicles may be on the track at the same time

final_answer: rule D.12.1.5: Multiple vehicles may be on the track at the same time
